name: What do I do if insurance already has my AI chats from my car accident claim?
description: Tell your lawyer now, explain inconsistencies—AI chats are discoverable evidence like any doc.[1]

mainEntity.name: What do I do if insurance already has my AI chats from my car accident claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tell your lawyer now, explain inconsistencies—AI chats are discoverable evidence like any doc.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Immediately notify your attorney and stop using AI; prepare to explain inconsistencies.[1] Per *Heppner* (S.D.N.Y. 2026), AI prompts can be discovery evidence showing fault admissions or inflated damages in personal injury cases.[1] Insurers request broad device data, recoverable via logs.[1]

**Key factors:**
- Chats treated as any document in discovery.[1]
- Speculations about fault/deposition quotes harmful.[1]
- No privilege without lawyer direction.[1]

Work with counsel to frame chats as preliminary thoughts, not facts; challenge overbroad requests. Avoid further AI use to prevent worsening.[1] Focus on strong non-AI evidence.
